description: Wow! Stunning End-Unit Duplex Townhome in Vinterra! This beautifully updated 3,879 sq ft home features 3 spacious bdrms + den and 3.5 baths, with over $50K in recent upgrades including new flooring, custom shelving, fresh paint, and more! The bright, open-concept main floor boasts a vaulted living room with statement fireplace, gourmet Jenn-Air kitchen with quartz counters, formal dining room, and a cozy den/home office with its own fireplace. Step out to your private southwest-facing patio complete with built-in outdoor kitchen—perfect for summer entertaining! Upstairs you’ll find 2 oversized primary bdrms, each with ensuites, plus convenient upper laundry. The bsmt is an entertainer’s dream with a full bar, media room, rec space, guest bdrm and bath. A rare find!
